message:
fix: prevent ensure_visible underflow and fix LogViewer filtered scroll edge cases

- VirtualizedSearch::ensure_visible guards against vh==0 underflow
- LogViewer filtered scroll clamps usize::MAX sentinel before arithmetic
- is_filtered_at_bottom returns false when viewport size unknown
- Filtered scroll_down uses correct max offset (total - visible_count)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
